name: tngo
description: Reusable TNGO workflow plugin with skills and an AGENTS.md/config.toml installer.

interface.shortDescription: Reusable Codex skills and guidance installer.
interface.longDescription: TNGO Workflow packages personal Codex skills, including read-only answers, deep research, cleanup workflows, and a separate installer for applying recommended AGENTS.md guidance plus a bundled global config.toml.
defaultPrompt: Install my Codex AGENTS.md guidance and config
